optional_services: There are no optional service components within this service.
prerequisites:
Conditions Everything that is not included in this service description is by default out of scope. Maintenance & Licenses Cegeka is responsible for the proper operation of the service. This includes the number of licenses and maintenance. Measurement
A report is generated on a monthly basis, this report is based on the CMDB and lists all servers and and components for which this service is applicable.
Billing
The units are billed against the price of their respective part numbers.
Changes
Changes are brought up through the normal service management process.
differentiators:
Introduction The content of this service description (Chapter 1) is used to compile a service catalog that is used in the contract with the client. This introduction and document history below are for internal use only. It is allowed to merge Chapter 1 with other service descriptions into a single service catalog. Modifying the content of Chapter 1 for individual clients is not allowed. (If necessary, any adjustments can only be made with approval from the responsible service owner of product manager.) To support the service delivery processes, Cegeka monitors various aspects of the different components (availability, capacity, security, database backups) via the central monitoring platform. All monitoring information is accessible to our technicians and to certain employees of the Customer and is visualized via a central uniform web interface. Service windows and maintenance windows are defined per managed system (this information is centrally stored and updated in the Cegeka CMDB). A link between the Cegeka CMDB and the monitoring platform ensures that the monitoring platform is always working with the latest information. This also ensures that the service levels are very clear to both the support teams and the service delivery manager.

Cegeka is responsible for providing the following services:
Security
The Service is certified against ISO27001. Processes for managing this service are part of the yearly ISAE3000 statement.
Patching & Lifecycle management
Not applicable for this service
Capacity Management
Not applicable for this service
